summary: Tested Food Stores Seed Data and Driver Proximity Notification System for Trend Syria. All backend APIs working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI verified - all 4 food category tabs (وجبات سريعة, ماركت, خضار وفواكه, حلويات) display correctly with seeded stores. Driver proximity notification system fully implemented.

issues: Some 404 errors in console for store images (likely from image URLs that no longer exist)

food_stores_seed_data.details: 8 new stores seeded (2 fast_food, 2 market, 2 vegetables, 2 sweets) with 54+ products

food_stores_filter_by_category.details: Filtering by fast_food, market, vegetables, sweets all working correctly

food_products_per_store.details: Each store has products with names, prices, descriptions, and images

driver_location_update_api.details: Updates driver location with latitude, longitude. Triggers proximity check when order_id is provided

proximity_notification_check.details: Uses Haversine formula. Sends notification when driver is < 500m from customer. nearby_notification_sent flag prevents duplicates

calculate_eta_with_distance.details: Calculates distance using Haversine, estimates arrival time based on speed (default 30 km/h), returns is_nearby flag

frontend_category_tabs.details: Tabs visible: الكل, وجبات سريعة, ماركت, خضار وفواكه, حلويات. Clicking tabs filters stores correctly

frontend_driver_tracking_alert.details: Shows 'السائق وصل!' alert with distance when driver is < 0.5km from customer (line 139-149)

critical_code_review_comments: Haversine formula correctly implemented in both backend (check_proximity_and_notify) and frontend (DriverTrackingMap)
nearby_notification_sent flag prevents duplicate notifications - good design pattern
calculate_eta returns distance_km and is_nearby fields for frontend consumption
Food stores properly seeded with store_type field for filtering (fast_food, market, vegetables, sweets)
Frontend FoodPage.js uses 'category' param for API filtering which matches backend endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Food seed data fully implemented with 8 new stores and 54 products. Driver proximity notification works when distance < 500m. DriverTrackingMap shows 'السائق وصل!' alert. All food category tabs filter correctly.
implementation_notes: Driver location updates trigger proximity check via check_proximity_and_notify()
Frontend DriverTrackingMap polls location every 5 seconds
Backend calculate_eta() returns is_nearby: true when distance < 0.5km
